programme.desc: Zee, a modern girl who has just returned from the UK to celebrate Hari Raya, quarrels with her mother, Hasnah who is very obsessed with Malay dramas. After a big fight, Zee woke up in a world of drama that he didn't like all this time, including facing clichd scenes. While in the realm of drama, Zee is reminded of the culture he left behind and his true self. At first, Zee thought love was the way out of this fantasy world but in reality Zee had to apologize and reconcile with her mother.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 7
programme.desc: Nadia introduces her bridesmaids to Ashraf and in come Jen, Nadia's cousin. The one who Ashraf ghosted 16 years ago. Zainab hired a private investigator as she suspects that Mazlan is having an affair. A renowned food reviewer is coming to check on The Nom Nom Boys. As they were helping out the wedding prep, Ashraf and Jen seems to hit it off... wrongly.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 8
programme.desc: Martha tries to convince J.P not to get married to Nadia. Zainab follows Mazlan discreetly and find out the truth. Sally reveals to Bob that she is pregnant.. much to the delight of Bob and the dismay of Sally. Seeing Ashraf and Jen happy with one another makes Nadia have doubts if she has feelings towards Ashraf in the first place. To make matters worse, Martha came to see Ashraf and tell him something that can ruin the wedding.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 9
programme.desc: Bob is oblivious that J.P is sending him to Bangkok for an urgent client presentation. Zainab met her ex crush back in secondary school, Zack, and got smitten by him. J.P is asking for Ashraf's help as he loses his card. Jen organised a Bachelorette Party and discovers that Nadia might have feelings towards Ashraf. J.P came back home and someone from the past is waiting for him, Sherilyn!

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 10
programme.desc: It's the eve of the wedding and the caterer goes missing! Not just the caterer but J.P goes missing as well and Ashraf feels he knows why. Bob is extremely frustrated that Sally didn't spend time with him to resolve their differences. Mazlan finally opens up about Yanni to Zainab. After almost 17 years, Ashraf did what he failed countless times to do before.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 11
programme.desc: The year is 2007. Before Nadia, there was this girl in the school by the name of Shayla Anggulia who Ashraf had a big crush on. Bob, an avid basketball player back then, likes to chat on the internet and happens to be in touch with a girl known as Naddy143. When Bob finally wants to meet Naddy143, he asked Ashraf to accompany him. That is when Ashraf met Nadia... AKA Naddy143 for the first time.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 12
programme.desc: The wedding day. Ashraf and Nadia realised that J.P goes missing (again!) after the incident last night. Something happened to Sally as she and Bob were searching for J.P. Mazlan tried to teach Zainab how to cycle but it's not easy as it seems. An unexpected assistance from someone led Ashraf and Nadia to J.P.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu - EP 13
programme.desc: Nadia, J.P and Ashraf arrived just in time for the solemnisation. After the mishap, Sally is determined to attend the wedding. Nadia and J.P finally weds and Ashraf disappeared just before the wedding is over, much to the dismay of Nadia. After one year of moving away and not contacting, Ashraf comes back and finally meet his friends. And Nadia.

programme.title: Kelab Prefect - EP 1
programme.desc: Adam, Luq and Firaz are notorious in school. However Mr Taufik knows that Adam is a boy with a good heart and decides to nominate him to be a Prefect in order to change him. Firaz and Luq celebrate at the thought of having a prefect in their group. Kael, the snobbish prefect is against this.

programme.desc: An informative and entertaining program that aims to show the uniqueness of the versatile small house and the minimalist life. In a dreamlike world, she meets legendary Malay icons such as Hang Nadim, Radin Mas and Badang. Through these encounters, Ayla learns that the true spirit of Raya lies in forgiveness, gratitude, love and togetherness.

Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Ergonomic handles offer a comfortable, secure grip, while no-drip rims prevent spills. The CookStar® base works on all stoves—including induction—for even, effortless cooking. Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. programme.title: The Two Gladiators
programme.desc: After the death of Marcus Aurelius, an emissary is dispatched to locate his twin brother to assume the throne.

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. They hide the money in an empty coffin and hire a woman to pose as a widow to a dead officer to make it look official. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.desc: In this week's episode, we portray one of the most popular drivers of Formula 1's starting grid: Alfa Romeo's Kimi Raikonnen.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Renault - EP2
programme.desc: In this week's episode, we focus on the former Formula 1 champion, Renault, and the desire of the French brand to return to its times of glory.

programme.desc: We focus on the cutting-edge team of Grand Prix, Red Bull Racing.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Valtteri Bottas - EP4

programme.desc: This week's episode is devoted to the Spanish sensation Carlos Sainz.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - German Footballer - EP17
programme.desc: Who is the greatest German footballer of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Pierre Gasly - EP22
programme.desc: The drivers and stables are the stars of F1, but the circuits on which they compete are just as important. We look at the greatest circuits of the discipline and what makes them classic.

programme.title: Only Live Once - FISE Malaysia - EP21
programme.desc: Only Live Once presents action from the FISE World Series from two different sites: Malaysia will cover the skate park while in CHENG DU, in China, we will concentrate on the best of the BMX fleet.

programme.title: The Truth About - The Dream Team - EP21
programme.desc: England's third goal in the World Cup final of 1966 has been one of the most controversial in the history of football. The United States assembled the greatest collection of basketball talents on the planet for the 1992 Olympic Games.

programme.title: Chill - California, Switzerland And Canada - EP20
programme.desc: Chill goes to Kirkwood, in California, for the snowboard during the fourth leg of the Freeside World Tour. Then, Lenzerheide, in Switzerland, puts the stars of the world cup to the test with a combination of Super G, Slalom, Downhill and Giant Slalom.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Red Bull - EP23
programme.desc: Red Bull's opportunities to compete in F1 are limited by the calendar, but the team and the promotion campaign never stop outside of the track, the team begin famous for its astonishing demonstration races.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Pierre Gasly - EP22
programme.desc: Only Live Once spends some time with two superstars of BMX. Daniel Dhers and Alex Colbourn talk about what it's like being a professional rider in the FISE World Series.

programme.title: The Truth About - Wilder vs Fury - EP22
programme.desc: The first fight between Deontay Wilder and Tyson Fury was a modern classic of heavyweight boxing. In 1973, everything changed in women's tennis, and Billie Jean King led the charge.

programme.title: Chill - Monaco Snowmobile Racing - EP21
programme.desc: Chill meets freeskier Drew Tabke to talk about the important business of choosing the best line. Afterwards Chill goes to Kirkwood in the USA for the Freerie World Tour and finally to the mobile snow piste in Austria.

programme.desc: In this week's episode, we portray one of the most popular drivers of Formula 1's starting grid: Alfa Romeo's Kimi Raikonnen.

programme.desc: This week's episode is devoted to the Spanish sensation Carlos Sainz.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Greatest Swimmers - EP18
programme.desc: Mark Spitz was considered as the greatest male swimmer of all time until the arrival of Michael Phelps.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Alex Albon - EP24
programme.desc: Anglo-Thai driver Alex Albon has shown himself to be one of the most brilliant talents of F1 with spells at Toro Rosso, Red Bull Racing and now Williams.

programme.title: Only Live Once - FISE Roller - EP23
programme.desc: Only Live Once is going to the FISE World Series for its combination of skills and strong sensations. First, it's the final of the Roller Park Pro of Cheng Du in China, where the world's best face off up until the last minute.

programme.title: The Truth About - Osaka vs Williams - EP23
programme.desc: Naomi Osaka won the 2018 US Open, but the beaten finalist Serena Williams stole the show. Andy Ruiz Jr should not have faced Anthony Joshua in 2019, but he left the Madison Square Garden as world heavyweight champion.

programme.title: Chill - Burton High Fives - EP22
programme.desc: Chill goes to the Cardrona Mountain station in New Zealand for the Burton High Fives, a unique event highlighting some of the best slopestyle and halfpipe riders in the world who face each other on and off the piste.

programme.title: The Iconic - Olympics - Cycling - EP11
programme.desc: Jason and Laura Kenny were the number one husband and wife duo of the Olympic Games, they directed a group of British cyclists on the track in 2008 and 2012, while Nino Schurter, the great mountain bike specialist, has a full list of achievements.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Cycling - EP41
programme.desc: Who is the greatest cyclist of all time?

programme.title: Top 10 - Best and Worst Cycling Spots - EP127
programme.desc: The Top 10 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: The Truth About - Osaka vs Williams - EP32
programme.desc: After his retirement, heavyweight legend Wladimir Klitschko continues to fight for a better world. UFC fighter Khabib Nurmagomedov meets Cristiano Ronaldo and controversial skater Tonya Harding finds salvation in the ring.

programme.title: The Truth About - Michael Jordan - EP14
programme.desc: Michael Jordan first danced for the Chicago Bulls in 1998. Ágnes Keleti dominated the Melbourne Olympic Games in 1956. And India stunned the world with victory at the 1983 cricket World Cup.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - NBA Teams - EP6
programme.desc: Jordan's Bulls, Bill Russel's Celtics, Magic's Lakers or the Warriors at three points? Who is the best NBA team of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Men's Tennis Player - EP19
programme.desc: Who is the greatest male tennis player of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Lando Norris - EP25
programme.desc: Lando Norris, from McLaren, forms part of the new guard of Formula 1, and seeks to impose himself as the next Grand Prix megastar.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Wladimir Klitschko - EP24
programme.desc: This episode starts with the BMX supercross. The series heads to Holland where the immense track of Papendal hosts some furious action.

programme.title: The Truth About - Kaepernick Vs Armstrong - EP24
programme.desc: Colin Kaepernick risked his career for a political protest. Lance Armstrong built his career on a lie.

programme.title: Chill - Alpine Rockfest - EP23
programme.desc: Chill heads for the banks of the lake of Zurich for some freeski big air trials. Then, the Cardona Mountain Resort station will bring still stronger sensations with the teams who face each other during the Burton High Fives.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - 100m Dash - EP1
programme.desc: Who is the greatest sprinter of all time? Today, all eyes look to Usain Bolt. But if we go back in time, athletes like Calvin Smith, Ben Johnson and Carl Lewis have set the pace.

programme.desc: Who is the greatest footballer of all time?

programme.desc: From the 4 metre longboards of yesteryear to the rapid shortboards of today, surfing has given birth to many legends. But who is the greatest surfer of all?

programme.desc: Report on the greatest boxing rivalries of all time.

programme.desc: Who is the greatest Formula 1 driver of all time?

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Ground Control to Biggie D - EP107
programme.desc: Biggie D goes on an unexpected trip into space.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Mellodees - ABC's Song - EP1
programme.desc: Learn the alphabet while you dance and sing-a-long with Dee!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Cynicale Cycler - EP112
programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team stop Nick Slick from dumping electronics into the environment.

programme.desc: Klaus is on loan to a local car museum, but the Shaq Paq gets the wrong idea and suits up for a clandestine rescue operation.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Great Bouncing Eyeballs! / Rock It to the Moon - EP123
programme.desc: When Von Bolt has trouble with his eyes, The Secret Lab Kids grow an assortment of fantastical eyeballs but when they accidentally get bounced all over town it means big trouble! / When Von Bolt accidentally destroys the museum’s new moon rock, the Secret Lab Kids must find a way to replace it.

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Love is in the Airhole | Episode 3
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Digger Train
programme.desc: Billy the Bulldozer's trapped in the tunnel! Teddy turns Troy into a digger to rescue his poor friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Demolition Train
programme.desc: Little Tina is trapped under a building! Teddy and Troy waste no time and devise a plan to rescue her.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy Scissorhands
programme.desc: Billy and Taylor need help clearing the tracks; they're full of overgrown weeds. Teddy transforms Troy into a giant pruning train.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Lifeguard
programme.desc: Henry has fallen into the lake and needs urgent help! Troy transforms into a lifeguard to rescue his friend.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Troy the Film Director
programme.desc: Tony needs someone to film his daring stunt and enlists Troy's help. Teddy transforms him into a camera rig!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nadar
programme.desc: Glub, glub, glub! Aprenda os estilos de natação e os cuidados com a água na hora de nadar!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tambem sou um animal
programme.desc: Somos todos animais, e se temos os nossos bichinhos, não podemos deixar de cuidar deles com carinho!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Quem eu sou
programme.desc: Uma brincadeira musical sobre nossas confusas relações de parentesco!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Barulhinho bom
programme.desc: Um rock que nos ensina que a música pode ser feita por qualquer um a qualquer hora!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Brincar
programme.desc: Nada de ficar parado! Mais que brinquedos, para brincar é preciso muita imaginação e energia!Nada de ficar parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Nana, Girafinha
programme.desc: Depois do agito, deixe a criançada relaxar ao som de uma gostosa bossa-nova!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarelvis 02
programme.desc: O mundo fica ainda mais divertido com a ajuda dos amigos do Jacarelvis!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Banho eu vou tomar
programme.desc: Agora ficou fácil dar o banho das crianças com essa animada canção!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - O Lixo e o meu tesouro
programme.desc: Uma aventura pirata que ensina sobre geração de lixo e reciclagem! Arrá! Iourrou!

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Altamira
programme.desc: Chip and the atoms enter into a cave that is full of paintings on the walls. A gate blocks the way to the cave in a place where cells of chemical elements and an oven are piled up. Following the directions of the paintings and with the help of Chip’s chemistry book he discovers he has to mix and merge several elements for make a shoes of glass with which he is able to walk on a floor full of acid, so that the door is lifted and he can follow the road. When the antimatters try to follow him, when mixing chemicals products, these smash their noses.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - The load
programme.desc: A transport loaded with nitrates is directed towards the Black Tower for Dr. No to prepare explosives. Chip, slips in the transport with the intention of being carried to his destination, but when he realizes about the load, makes every effort to ensure that this does not fall into the hands of the evil scientist. So with the help of bromine atoms prisoners, manages to destroy the transport and its dangerous load.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Snow Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Basketball Game
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - UFO Invasion
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Strongest Truck
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he's completely out of control!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Fresh & Clean
programme.desc: Baby Frank's been playing at the paint shooting range as in covered in it! Tom gets him all shiny again.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Baby Hector's spent the afternoon jumping in puddles; the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Beehive
programme.desc: Jeremy's crashed into a beehive and is covered in honey! Tom helps him get rid of the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - Rusty Chuck
programme.desc: Chuck’s Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom’s Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash - Tom's Car Wash - The Playdate
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures...

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 3
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder S1 - EP 3

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 42
programme.desc: As Aunty Lee and Insp Salim uncover new clues in the missing heirloom case, Cherril and Noel’s relationship begins to crumble under the weight of a scandal that refuses to die.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 8 关键证人
programme.desc: Guo Ying receives tip off about important evidence for an arms smuggling case. Finding it suspicious, she reports to Wu Sir, who deploys Ying Jie and a few other CID personnel to investigate. In the house, Ying Jie finds a microchip and hides it. As Ying Jie was going to check the microchip data, Guo Ying appears. She realises her father, Yao Kang, is the mole in the police force.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 13 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: A foreign worker who once helped Wei Ren fix his computer is moving house. Wei Ren and Ting Xuan offer to help him. While helping him, they start to develop some feelings for each other. As they come into physical contact, their hearts start beating quickly, and they suspect they have fallen for each other. Upon reaching home, they are unable to sleep well as the memories of them spending time with each other replay in their minds.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 14 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Yan Xun gifts a new bracelet to Xi Yue, but Xi Yue is not elated upon receiving it. She feels that the old bracelet has too much meaning to her, and that its importance cannot be replaced by the new bracelet. Yan Xun does not understand why Xi Yue is so stubborn, and the two of them argue. In a fit of anger, Xi Yue runs downstairs and flings the bracelet away. After the incident, she regrets doing so and wants to find the bracelet back, but her search for it is in vain.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 1 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 2 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: The 4 Chefs - EP 7 四大名厨
programme.desc: An outdoor reality cooking series featuring four well-loved celebrity chefs in a culinary quest.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 1 前线追踪
programme.desc: The war in the Middle East has wreaked massive havoc in travellers’ plans. Frontline speaks to one returning Singaporean who was supposed to work in Dubai but has now decided to embark on a new journey in Singapore. How have Singaporeans’ travel plans changed? Some tourists flew across the world just to see the Merlion—only to find it wrapped in scaffolding. Why? Watch to find out how Singapore keeps its iconic statue spotless.

programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 18 一路惊魂
programme.desc: Nick suddenly turns the car around and tries to knock Y over. Despite seeing the oncoming car, Y stays still. They both swerve away at the last second, narrowly avoiding a collision. After checking on Nick, Jane finds Y, who’s crashed into the bushes. He’s unconscious but looks unhurt. Nick thinks Y is feigning injury and asks Jane to leave, but she insists on staying until the ambulance arrives.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 4 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Big Biz Duel - EP 48 企业强人
programme.desc: When Shidai’s warehouse sorting machines break down, Dao Ming and Fang Fang lead the staff to manually sort packages and resolve the crisis. Meanwhile, Song Qiao remains missing, and Dao Ming confronts Ding Ning, who seems to know her whereabouts.

programme.title: Focus - EP 1 焦点
programme.desc: The Middle East conflict is forcing flights to take long detours, hitting aviation hubs in Dubai and Doha. Is the global airline industry facing a reshuffle? Meanwhile, the U.S. has launched another tariff investigation, with our country included—how will this impact the industry? Cultural award winner Goh Boon Teck has led his team in bringing Singapore theatre to the global stage.

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1050 甘味人生
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: The mysterious sea captain Billy Bones arrives at the Benbow Inn only to meet an untimely death. Shortly afterwards the innkeeper's son receives the 'black spot' and a faded treasure map. After consulting with his two trusted friends, they set sail for .

programme.title: Double Target
programme.desc: After several American and British military personnel are killed in suicide attacks throughout Southeast Asia, the U.S. begins to suspect a plot by the Vietnam government. To uncover the truth, the U.S. army calls upon a former commando who is looking for his long-lost son in Vietnam. While his military commanders want to see the commando succeed in his mission, his political overseers have a different set of plans.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Tolerance - EP114
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that tolerance is about living in harmony, accepting, and respecting the tastes of other people, as well as helping those who need it without expecting to receive something in return. We are all different and that makes the world so special, that's why you have to be supportive and show solidarity for others.

programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Tolerance - EP114
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that tolerance is about living in harmony, accepting, and respecting the tastes of other people, as well as helping those who need it without expecting to receive something in return. We are all different and that makes the world so special, that's why you have to be supportive and show solidarity for others.

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3
programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep7 - EP107
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Invasive Vector - EP113
programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team stop Nick Slick from sending tires infested with mosquitoes to Europe.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Great Race - EP110
programme.desc: Klaus's claim of being the fastest car int he world is put to the test.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Nicky’s Compass Goes South / A Gem of a Deal - EP101
programme.desc: When the SECRET LAB KIDS head off to rescue some stranded hikers with the aid of Nicky’s cell phone compass her battery fizzles out and the team must return to the lab and build a conventional compass

programme.title: Mellodees - The Grand Old Duke Of York - EP27
programme.desc: What a great day! It’s time for an outdoor stretch. Can you sing ‘The Grand Duke of York’? Then join the march with Dee on the streets!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - To Catch a Truck - EP111
programme.desc: Shaq's special painting is stolen, It's up to the Shaq Paq to find the thief and recover the work of art.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep6 - EP106
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep6 - EP6
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Tolerance - EP114
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that tolerance is about living in harmony, accepting, and respecting the tastes of other people, as well as helping those who need it without expecting to receive something in return. We are all different and that makes the world so special, that's why you have to be supportive and show solidarity for others.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Justice - EP115
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that justice is when we are all treated equally, regardless of our differences, and we must give and receive the same attention to other people. Respect is shown by good treatment, complying with the laws to live in peace! We will also understand freedom and how to use it intelligently.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Pesticide Pest - EP201
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight pollution in the Missouri River from pesticides from being dumped.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Dog Who Loved Me - EP112
programme.desc: Fleming rescues a puppy and learns how fun it can be to raise a pup.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - The Eagle Has Landed / Bee-Gone - EP102
programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle’s nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety. / When JD and Kent discover there’s a shortage of beeswax for their surfboards, it leads to the discovery that all the local honeybees have vanished from the beehives.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Terror Tubes Takedown | Episode 7
programme.desc: The Gang dives headfirst into the Fear Zone - and it’s pure chaos. With Nightmare Mode activated and the Fear Bomb ticking, only faith can light the way.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | The Breath of Courage | Episode 8
programme.desc: With 60 seconds left, the Fear Bomb ticks toward doom. Kungfuda and God's Gang fight with faith and love - will light prevail or fear win?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Tyson the Tanker refuels Jeremy
programme.desc: Oh no, Jeremy ran out of gas! Troy selects the most perfect truck to refuel him: Tyson the Tanker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Francis the Forklift helps at the construction site
programme.desc: Edgar made a mess at the construction site! Troy selects the best truck to help with the clean-up: Francis the Forklift!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Tyler the Tyke steals candy
programme.desc: Tyler stole some candy from Baby Francis! Troy selects the bravest, fastest car to stop him: Matt the Police Car!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker saves the day!
programme.desc: There's a blackout in Car City! Troy selects the most ingenious truck to reconnect the cables: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Carl the Super Truck helps Frank the Firetruck
programme.desc: A lost container sends Troy into investigation mode. Who and where did it come from? He's very helpful and can transform!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - The Babies' trip to the Moon
programme.desc: The Babies are fascinated by the moon! Troy selects the most cosmic truck to help them get there: Rocky the Rocket!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - QUACK-QUACK - SUPERJUMP! ROOKIE AND THE FROG
programme.desc: Rookie is sitting by a pond when he suddenly sees eyes staring at him from the water. Thinking of his friend the crocodile, he first keeps a safe distance, but then realizes that it is a cool frog that jumps out of the water and performs some awesome tricks. Rookie watches and tries to copy, and it doesn’t take too long to master such leaps, the frog being an excellent teacher. And when the frog finally falls, Rookie is fast enough to catch it and save it from harm.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - FLY, ROOKIE FLY! ROOKIE AND THE BIRD
programme.desc: Rookie is enjoying a sunny day when he spots a playful little bird drawing circles and shapes in the sky. Inspired to fly, Rookie climbs a tall tree to jump - but after a split second, the only way is down! Quickly, Rookie activates his parachute and lands safely. Although the bird is bursting with laughter, Rookie doesn‘t give u,p and with the help of a giant propeller, he manages to impress his new little friend.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - MOOOO WHO? ROOKIE AND THE BLIND COW
programme.desc: On his tour, Rookie discovers a small cow trapped in a pit and unable to escape on its own. He quickly rushes to its rescue and lifts it to safety. After helping the cow, Rookie realizes the cause of her fall: Very poor eyesight! Rookie presses a button, his body buzzing as he generates a pair of glasses. Rookie puts them on the little cow’s nose - and now she can see everything and even manages a high-fi ve to say goodbye before proudly taking off.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - PICTURE THIS! ROOKIE AND THE CAMERA
programme.desc: Rookie stumbles upon a device, picks it up, and as he goes to examine it, it flashes, and an instant picture comes out. Rookie is thrilled and immediately starts taking pictures of his entire surroundings from all sides and in all sorts of positions. Finally, he has a great idea: In his amazing new photo salon set up in a tent, photo artist Rookie will soon be waiting for all his friends to take wonderful portraits of them!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BOOKS ARE MAGIC! ROOKIE AND THE LIBRARY
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large library and is fascinated and attracted by all the colorful books. He picks up the first book, but gets frightened when the smiling shark on the cover turns into a ravenous biter after only one page. He chooses another book with a clown’s face and laughs at the funny pictures inside, then one about astronauts and the moon, and another with beautiful landscapes, before he finds an empty, completely white book that gives him a whole new idea.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - DANCE WITH YOUR FRIENDS – ROOKIE THE DJ
programme.desc: On his hike, Rookie discovers a strange, shiny globe hanging from a tree. He gently taps it, and the ball immediately begins to spin, reflecting the light beautifully in all directions: A disco ball! Just behind i, the Rookie finds a DJ booth and soon the music starts and the party begins! Lights are flashing, and all his buddies show up to have a dance with their friends under the sparkling disco ball.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - MY SAND IS MY CASTLE! ROOKIE AND THE CRAB
programme.desc: Rookie enjoys a beautiful day by the sea, playing in the warm sand. He starts to build a sandcastle, which soon gets bigger and bigger soon and notices a crab, which is interested in his building and starts to explore it like his own house. There is a new idea! He presses a button and becomes as small as the little friend, and together they play games inside the sandcastle, before their fun is interrupted by a big wave.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - FRIENDS IN THE SKY, FRIENDS FLYING HIGH? ROOKIE AND THE CLOUDS
programme.desc: What could be better than a meadow of flowers on a beautiful day? Rookie is enjoying the sun and the beautiful blue sky, watching the clouds pass by - but wait! What‘s that? One of the clouds turns, and suddenly its shape reminds him of one of his friends! And who is that again? What a fun game to play! Rookie continues to search for clouds that remind him of his friends and their adventures together.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - The castle of Robins
programme.desc: Since the lens fails to be recovered, Dr. No wants to make another, but he needs robins to make it. So he attacks Rubidia, a region filled with different precious stones. But Oxin the king of Rubidia makes Dr. No his prisoner. And locked him in the castle where Chip is also locked, as Oxin also makes them prisoners to make them work as slaves in his mines. Dr. No try to make Chip to give him back the lens, but Chip denies. Later, the two manage to escape from the castle and Dr. No chases Chip with his craft. But the boy gets the scientist falls into a trap and also helps free the slaves of Rubidia.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - The harmonica trap
programme.desc: Chip and his friends create a zone with formations resembling musical instruments and make sounds harmonious. Suddenly, they become trapped within a rectangle of quartz crystals that vibrate when they form a sonic trap. A musician atom who has caught them, seeks members to assemble an orchestra. The antimatters are near and Chip asked the musician to prepare the trap to retain them and escape. The musician agrees and the antimatters are prisoners of the musician that makes them hear the terrible sound of his compositions.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Aliens
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster merge into Robo and set a trap for a rogue UFO that's abducted baby cars from the beach.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Ghost Busting
programme.desc: Time to merge! A "ghost" has stolen cakes from the cake-eating competition, Rodeo and Booster get ready to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Missing Pipes
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to catch Zitron after he steals Billy's pipes. Matilda the Police Car helps them.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.desc: Miranda makes a cure to cheer up Mia, but she runs out of Happy Bird Eggs!

programme.desc: Mia is blown away in a strong wind while trying to retrieve Miranda's kite, and the Monster Trucks are in pursuit!
